   //#endregion\\n\\n    //#region Public API\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依角度重置轉盤 Z 軸角度（度數）\\n     * @param angleDeg 角度（度數）\\n     */\\n    public ResetRouletteAngle(angleDeg: number = 0): void {\\n        if (!this.m_RotateRootNode || !this.m_RotateRootNode.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_RotateRootNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, angleDeg);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依索引重置轉盤角度\\n     * @param stopIndex 要對準上方的位置索引\\n     */\\n    public ResetRouletteAngleByIndex(stopIndex: number): void {\\n        const target = this.CalcTargetAngle(stopIndex);\\n        this.ResetRouletteAngle(target);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 開始旋轉到指定索引\\n     * @param stopIndex 停到的目標索引\\n     * @param finishCallback 完成回呼（可選）\\n     */\\n    public StartRotate(stopIndex: (this.m_finishCallback) { this.m_finishCallback(); }\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 停止上一個旋轉\\n        this.Stop();\\n\\n        const targetAngle = this.CalcTargetAngle(stopIndex);\\n        this.m_currentTween = this.RotateRoulette(targetAngle);\\n        if (this.m_currentTween) {\\n            this.m_currentTween.start();\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /** @ch 是否正在旋轉 */\\n    public IsRotating(): boolean {\\n        return this.m_currentTween !== null;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 停止旋轉\\n     * @param triggerCallback 是否觸發完成回呼（預設 CalcTargetAngle(stopIndex: number): number {\\n        if (this.m_iItemCount <= 0) {\\n            console.warn('[RouletteRotate] m_iItemCount 必須 > 0');\\n            return 0;\\n        }\\n\\n (this.m_RotateClockRotation === ClockRotation.Clockwise) ? -1 : 1;\\n\\n        // 算出目標角度（以 0 度為基準）\\n        let targetAngle = 0;\\n        if (rotateDirectionValue === -1) {\\n            targetAngle = (360 - (stopIndex * angleGap) % 360);\\n        } else {\\n            targetAngle = (stopIndex * angleGap) % 360;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 若盤面排序為逆時鐘，需要鏡像\\n        if 360;\\n\\n        // 套用旋轉方向\\n        targetAngle *= rotateDirectionValue;\\n\\n        return targetAngle;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 建立旋轉 tween（不自動 start）\\n     * @param targetAngle
